name: Animated Explainer
description: Simple hand-drawn cartoon illustrations with word-level visual changes. Think Mack-style explainer videos — cheap to produce, massive engagement.
thumbnail_style: Bold hand-drawn cartoon style thumbnail with thick black outlines, flat muted colors, simple stick figure character, large text overlay, eye-catching composition
example_topics: The tribe that has never been contacted by the modern world
Why ancient Romans were terrified of this one island
The forgotten kingdom that ruled half of Africa
